app.name: Plate-Clean
app.footer: Finishing a meal isn't a moral test — it's a small win for the planet.

my_sessions.title: Your sessions
my_sessions.blurb: Every meal you've started with us. Live sessions sit at the top — tap Resume to pick up where you left off.
my_sessions.empty: No sessions yet. Scan a table QR to start your first meal.

landing.headline:
Finish your plate.
Unlock a reward.
landing.description: Snap your plate before & after. Eat what you love — when little goes to waste, a free dish or a discount is on us.
landing.tagline_disclaimer: Less food into the bin means less methane out of it. That's the only scoreboard we keep.
landing.live_aria: Live number, updates in real time
landing.how_scan_d: Point at the QR on the table tent.
landing.how_snap_d: Two quick photos of your plate.
landing.ethics_note: Rewards are a thank-you for reducing waste — not a judgement. No reward just means a smaller portion next time. Photos kept 7 days.

onboard_choice.headline: How would you like to continue?
onboard_choice.subheadline: Pick the way that's fastest for you. Your reward and receipt work the same either way.
onboard_choice.phone_blurb: We'll text you a 6-digit code. No password, no account setup.
onboard_choice.email_blurb: Sign in or create a full account. Bills also arrive in your inbox.
onboard_choice.no_account_blurb: One OTP to receive the reward SMS — we don't save your details after this visit.
onboard_choice.ethics_note: We only send bills, OTPs, and reward alerts. No marketing. Delete your data any time from Profile.

quick_start.title: Use your phone, skip the account
quick_start.blurb: Enter your phone number and we'll text you a one-time code. You'll get the reward both in this app and as an SMS so you don't have to keep this tab open.
quick_start.anon_blurb: One OTP so we can text your reward code — nothing else. We won't save your details after this visit.
quick_start.phone_hint: Include the country code, e.g. +91 for India.
quick_start.age_confirm: I confirm I am 18 or older.
quick_start.code_hint: Check your SMS. The code expires in 5 minutes.
quick_start.have_account: Have an account already? Sign in →

stats.title: Plate-Clean impact
stats.subtitle: Aggregate food kept out of the bin across every restaurant on the platform. No personal data — just the numbers.
stats.hero_unit: kg of food kept out of the bin
stats.methodology_1: We compare consumption against a 60% typical-meal baseline. Anything finished above that counts as saved food.
stats.methodology_2: Carbon factor: 2.5 kg CO₂e per kg of cooked food (lifecycle-inclusive, mixed Indian-meal average). One mature tree absorbs ≈ 0.06 kg CO₂e/day.
stats.empty_title: Not enough data yet to show aggregate numbers
stats.empty_blurb: We only publish numbers once enough restaurants and meals are counted in this window — so a single pilot can't be re-identified. Check back as we grow.

login.phone_hint: Include the country code, e.g. +91 for India. We use SMS for the reward alert and for password resets.
login.age_confirm: I confirm I am 18 or older.
login.switch_to_sign_in: Already have an account? Sign in

google_signin.not_configured: Google sign-in isn't set up on this deployment. Use email or phone instead.
google_signin.error_generic: Couldn't sign you in with Google. Try email or phone.

forgot_password.title: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.blurb: Enter the email or phone on your account. We'll send a 6-digit code to both your SMS and email — enter whichever arrives first.
forgot_password.reset_blurb: Check your email and SMS. The code expires in 5 minutes. Then pick a new password.
forgot_password.code_hint: Auto-fills on most phones when the SMS lands.
forgot_password.back_to_identifier: ← Try a different email or phone

accept_invite.title: Set your password
accept_invite.footer_hint: We'll drop you into the staff dashboard as soon as this succeeds.
accept_invite.err_fallback: Ask your restaurant owner to send a fresh invitation.
accept_invite.err_missing_token: This link is missing its invitation token.
accept_invite.err_password_short: Password needs to be at least 8 characters.

qr.unassigned_body: This QR isn't linked to a restaurant yet. Ask staff to bind it, or check the sticker isn't a demo from a display box.
qr.retired_body: The restaurant replaced this sticker. Ask staff for the current one on your table.
qr.unknown_body: Double-check you scanned a Plate-Clean sticker. If it looks correct, ask staff to reprint.
qr.session_expired: Your sign-in expired. Please sign in again.

scan.title: Start a meal
scan.blurb: In production this screen scans a QR sticker on your table. For the pilot, pick a restaurant and type your table code.

order.title: Place your order
order.blurb: Pick what you ordered. Default portion is small — pick more only if you're sure you'll eat it.
order.banner_default: Small is the default portion. Bump it up only if you know you'll finish.

capture.before_blurb: Hold the camera over your plates. Try to fit everything you ordered in the frame.
capture.after_blurb: Snap your plates the way they are right now. A server will review the picture next.
capture.guide_before: Fit every plate inside the circle.
capture.guide_after: Show the plates as they are right now.
capture.missing_nonce: This session was started in a different tab. Please start a new session from the QR screen.

session_status.title: Your meal
session_status.waiting_for_food_heading: Your order is on the way
session_status.waiting_for_food_blurb: Relax — no rush. When the plates arrive at your table, tap below and snap the before photo.
session_status.between_meals_hint: Enjoy your meal. When you're ready to pay, come back here.
session_status.review_heading: Your server is reviewing — usually under a minute.
session_status.review_blurb: A staff member checks the photo against your table before any reward is issued. We'll update this screen the moment they decide.
session_status.grew_forest_sub: Every clean plate ≈ a tree-day of carbon back. Small win, real ledger.
session_status.approved_heading: Approved — thanks for finishing what you ordered.
session_status.approved_blurb: Your score was just below the threshold this time, so no reward today. Try a smaller portion next visit to land it.
session_status.rejected_blurb: The server didn't see enough food finished to qualify. If you think this is wrong, you can raise a dispute — an owner will look at it within 48 hours.
session_status.cancelled_blurb_fallback: The restaurant staff cancelled this order. If you'd like to know why, ask at the counter — they can walk you through it.
session_status.raise_dispute_title: Something not right? Raise a dispute
session_status.raise_dispute_blurb: The restaurant owner reviews first; platform support steps in after 48 hours if it's not resolved.
session_status.disputed_blurb: The restaurant owner has been notified. You'll hear back within 48 hours, or platform support takes it from there.
session_status.get_bill_blurb: Emailed or texted to you. Show it at the counter to pay.

get_bill.title: Get my bill
get_bill.blurb: We'll send an itemised tax invoice with the GST split. Pay at the counter with the printed copy or your phone.
get_bill.sms_hint: Include the country code. Standard messaging rates apply.
get_bill.sent_email_blurb: Should land at {{target}} within a minute. Check spam if you don't see it.
get_bill.sent_sms_blurb: Should land at {{target}} within a minute.
get_bill.generic_error: Couldn't send the bill. Try again.
get_bill.redemption_hint: Paste an unredeemed bill-discount code — we'll knock it off this bill. Menu-item rewards can be claimed at the counter instead.
get_bill.redemption_hint_with_picker: Pick from the list above, or paste any other code you have. Only applies on first generation.
get_bill.reward_row_same_session: Earned in this meal — save for your next visit
get_bill.resend_frozen_note: Same items, same total ({{total}}). Issued {{date}} — the amount can't change on a resend.
get_bill.resend_coupon_applied: Reward {{code}} applied at issue time · already on this bill

raise_dispute.title: Raise a dispute
raise_dispute.blurb: Tell us what happened. The restaurant owner reviews first; platform support steps in after 48 hours if it's not resolved.
raise_dispute.details_placeholder_optional: Anything the owner should know — table, timing, what the server said…
raise_dispute.details_hint_optional: Optional. Anything you add speeds up the review.
raise_dispute.reason_placeholder: e.g. The staff rejected my after-photo but I had cleared the plate — the lighting was low so it may have looked messier than it was.
raise_dispute.reason_hint: At least {{min}} characters — the more detail, the faster the review.

plate_finished.label: I finished my plate — the score seems too low
plate_finished.label_en: I finished my plate — the score seems too low

wrong_plate.label: The wrong plate or session was reviewed
wrong_plate.label_en: The wrong plate or session was reviewed

staff_disagreement.label: I disagreed with the server at the table
staff_disagreement.label_en: I disagreed with the server at the table

raise_dispute.sent_blurb: The restaurant owner will review within 48 hours. Support at Plate-Clean has also been notified and will step in if it's not resolved by then.
raise_dispute.err_reason_missing: Please pick a reason so the owner knows where to start.
raise_dispute.err_reason_short: Please give us at least {{min}} characters — a short reason is hard to review fairly.
raise_dispute.error_generic: Couldn't file your dispute. Try again or ask at the counter.

choose_reward.heading: Pick how you'd like your reward.
choose_reward.value_blurb: Value: {{amount}}. Same either way. You have 30 days — full value for the first 15, half value after.

type.menu_item_blurb: Hand the code to your server. The kitchen sends out the dish.
type.bill_discount_blurb: Same value, applied as a discount the next time you eat at this restaurant. Good for 30 days.

rewards.title: Your rewards
rewards.empty: Nothing here yet. Finish your next meal and one will show up.
rewards.no_active_blurb: Your past rewards are still visible in History below — redeem or expiry details are kept for the record.

profile.title: Profile
profile.delete_confirm: Delete your account and all associated data? This cannot be undone.
profile.delete_blurb: Deletion happens within 7 days. Photos from your sessions are removed too.
profile.retention_blurb: How long should we keep the before / after photos from your meals? The default is one week. Opt in to 90 days to help us improve the model with your plates — you can change this any time.
profile.retention_7_caption: Photos are removed after one week.
profile.retention_90_caption: Helps train the model on real plates.
profile.password_blurb: Rotate your password any time. If you forget it, use the sign-in screen's "Forgot password?" link instead.
profile.password_new_hint: At least 8 characters. Use something different from the current one.
profile.password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.password_mismatch: The confirmation doesn't match the new password.
profile.password_same: New password must be different from the current one.
profile.password_error_generic: Couldn't update your password. Try again.
profile.disputes_blurb: Every dispute you've filed. Owners have 48 hours; platform support steps in after that.
profile.sustainability_empty: Finish your next meal to see your impact start to build up.
profile.sustainability_food_saved: kg of food kept out of the bin
profile.sustainability_blurb: We compare how much you ate to a typical restaurant baseline — anything above is food that didn't get thrown out.

notes.label: Note for the kitchen
notes.placeholder: e.g. less sugar, warm please, no onions
notes.has_notes_aria: This order has notes for the kitchen

waitlist.subtitle: Full house right now — leave your details and we'll seat you as soon as a table opens up.
waitlist.loading_position: Checking your place in the queue…
waitlist.error_restaurant_generic: We couldn't load this restaurant. Double-check the QR you scanned.
waitlist.error_name_required: Please add a name so staff can call you.
waitlist.error_submit_generic: Couldn't join the waitlist. Try again in a moment.
waitlist.field_email_helper: We'll only use this if we need to reach you.
waitlist.field_notes_placeholder: Any special requests? (e.g., high-chair, quiet corner)
waitlist.waiting_body: We'll seat parties of {{partySize}} as soon as we can. Please stay close to the entrance.
waitlist.seated_body: Please head to the counter — staff will show you to a table.
waitlist.removed_body: Please check with the staff if this is unexpected.
waitlist.leave_confirm: Leave the waitlist? Your spot won't be held.
